name: Almond Butter Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Stir in the almond extract and salt.
3. Gradually mix in the flour until a dough forms.
4. Cover the dough and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to firm up.
5. Form small balls of the chilled dough, about one inch in diameter.
6. Roll each ball in additional sugar to coat lightly.
7. Press a cookie stamp or flatten with the bottom of a glass to create an imprint on each cookie.
8. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 12-15 minutes, or until golden brown and set.
9. Allow cookies to cool completely before serving or storing.
